```{r setup, include = FALSE}
## package and list of various exercises
library("exams2forms")
exm <- list(
  # "excel.Rmd",
  # "week-04/gene-data",
  # "rexams/week-04/genomics.Rmd",
    here::here("rexams", "week-04", "googlesheets.Rmd"),
   here::here("rexams", "week-04", "mdb.Rmd"),
    here::here("rexams", "week-04", "kaggle-univ-csv.Rmd"),
  here::here("rexams", "week-04", "methane-csv.Rmd"),
  here::here("rexams", "week-04", "noaa.Rmd")
)
```

```{r quiz, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, results = "asis"}
exams2forms(exm, n = 3)
```
